plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI py Copilot Local Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu.
Type 'Teams Agent with Data' in the dropdown field labeled "Select an option" within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" interface in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the option "Teams Agent with Data" from the dropdown in the Visual Studio Code interface within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Type 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press "Enter" to confirm the selection of the "Customize" option from the dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.

Press the "Enter" key to select the "Default folder" option under the "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located" dropdown in Visual Studio Code's Workspace Folder setup interface.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
# Check if the file exists
FILE_PATH="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_vQHrU/src/app.py"
if [ ! -f "$FILE_PATH" ]; then
    echo "File $FILE_PATH does not exist."
    exit 1
fi

# Replace the specific text
sed -i 's/model=config.OPENAI_MODEL_NAME/model=config.OPENAI_MODEL_NAME, azure_endpoint = ""/g' "$FILE_PATH"

# Confirm the replacement
if grep -q "model=config.OPENAI_MODEL_NAME, azure_endpoint = \"\"" "$FILE_PATH"; then
    echo "Replacement successful."
else
    echo "Replacement failed."
    exit 1
fi
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
